subject: fix(export): PDF page size no longer scales with pixelRatio
body:
PDF page dimensions were multiplied by pixelRatio (e.g., 2x capture = 2x page),
so all quality levels had identical pixel density — mobile PDF viewers scaled the
oversized page back down, making Low/Standard/High look the same and blurry.

Page now stays at platform pixel dimensions while embedding higher-res images.
Quality levels produce clean integer pixel-per-point ratios (2:1 standard, 3:1
high) for genuinely sharper mobile rendering.

Tags: export, pdf, quality, mobile
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: pdf-export
Semver: patch
